distilleries.name: Casa Martini
distilleries.address: Piazza Luigi Rossi 2, Frazione Pessione, 10023 Chieri TO, Italy
distilleries.description: The historic Martini & Rossi home at Pessione, where the brand has made vermouth since 1864. Casa Martini pairs a working plant with museum galleries and guided tastings of its vermouth and sparkling range.
distilleries.distillation_method: Aromatised and fortified wine production; botanical maceration and blending of Vermouth di Torino
distilleries.tasting_program: Discovery tour with guided vermouth tasting; cocktail experience and vermouth-blending class by reservation

verified.address_quoted: Piazza Luigi Rossi, 2 - Frazione Pessione - 10023, Chieri

distilleries.name: Giulio Cocchi
distilleries.description: Vermouth and sparkling house founded 1891 in Asti, run since 1978 by the Bava family at Cocconato in the Monferrato hills. Maker of the Storico Vermouth di Torino and a Barolo Chinato.
distilleries.distillation_method: Aromatised wine production; herb and spice maceration to the original Giulio Cocchi recipe
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided visits and tastings at the Cocconato cellar, weekday slots with weekend by reservation

distilleries.name: Distilleria Marolo (Santa Teresa)
distilleries.description: Alba grappa house whose first grappas were distilled in 1977, working the pomace of noble Piedmont varieties. Cru grappa from single varietals such as Barolo and Moscato, with brandy and gin alongside.
distilleries.distillation_method: Discontinuous bain-marie copper alembic stills; pomace distilled fresh
distilleries.tasting_program: Weekend distillery visits and grappa tastings by appointment with at least three working days notice

distilleries.name: Distillerie Berta
distilleries.address: Via Guasti 34/36, Frazione Casalotto, 14056 Mombaruzzo AT, Italy
distilleries.description: Grappa distillery founded 1947 by Paolo Berta, set in the Monferrato countryside at Casalotto di Mombaruzzo. Known for long-aged grappa riserva; its Riserva del Fondatore won Bibenda's best Italian grappa 2023.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pomace distillation followed by extended barrel ageing in the estate cellars
distilleries.tasting_program: Daily distillery tour with tasting of three grappas or liqueurs by reservation; Bertanic picnic experience May to September
